repo_prior_art.cite: parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: inclusion/equality boundary and conditional margin already isolate the nested-support bookkeeping

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021 common-restriction LP/VAR equivalence; DrautzburgWright2023 independence-refined sign-restricted sets

repo_prior_art.cite: parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: primitive strict LP/sign versus non-Gaussian SVAR support gap; upgrade adds mechanism labels but one mechanism is not yet coherent
parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: chi_w(P) conditional quantitative margin; tau_w^*(P) is a proposed refinement but parent reduction is not yet algebraic

novelty_flags.label: upgrade_review
novelty_flags.one_line: Mechanism rubric is only partially delivered: the declared delta_summary promises row-exposure, cumulant-label, and common-rotation pasting components, but P_paste(P) collapses under nonempty Q_NG and P_paste(Q;P) duplicates the cumulant residual on LP-feasible rotations.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The critical-threshold flagship claim cites Guay2021 and Read2022 without a section/equation/page anchor tying either paper to the exact missing cumulant-distance support-bound gap.

novelty_flags.label: tier_floor
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship until the pasting mechanism is made mathematically nonredundant and the parent-margin reduction is shown by an explicit algebraic collapse.

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup / Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: P_paste is not well-posed as a separate horizon-pasting mechanism: the setup uses one common Q for all horizons already, d_h(Q) is undefined when A and Z mix horizons, and global P_paste(P)=0 follows from Assumption nonempty-ng.

soundness_flags.label: Sanity-check corollaries
soundness_flags.one_line: The parent reduction is hand-waved: tau_w^*(P)=lambda_w times a residual/pasting norm does not algebraically collapse to the parent epsilon-envelope margin chi_w(P) merely by not reporting the mechanism scores.

soundness_flags.label: Corollary common restrictions
soundness_flags.one_line: Removing the fourth-cumulant restriction does not imply L_delta4(P)=0 under the definitions; equality only follows after redefining Q_NG or imposing the same filtered feasible set on both sides.

soundness_flags.label: Abstract / Main results
soundness_flags.one_line: The abstract and §4 advertise three global operational quantities E_w(P), L_delta4(P), and P_paste(P), but §8 actually needs pointwise quantities at LP maximizers and the global P_paste(P) is vacuous under the stated assumptions.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The proposal adds mechanism labels and an iff/threshold shape, but the pasting component is mathematically redundant or vacuous as defined, so the parent margin is not yet genuinely decomposed.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace P_paste with a genuine horizonwise common-law defect using separate LP horizon optimizers Q_h and a distance-to-single-Q aggregation, then restate Conjectures 1-2 with that object.
Add an explicit §9 algebra showing the limit or normalization under which the mechanism threshold tau_w^*(P) becomes the parent chi_w(P), not just prose that the scores are collapsed.
Add location-level anchors for Guay2021 and Read2022 in Conjecture 2's why-new block, ideally pointing to the higher-moment rank condition and the sign/zero feasibility algorithm sections.

recommended_next_step: Revise the mechanism object first: make pasting nonredundant, prove the parent corner-case collapse algebraically, and then re-run novelty review.
